ddls:
CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the representative */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the representative represents */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the mailing address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the mailing address */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province of the mailing address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the mailing address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the representative */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the representative's photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the representative's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the representative */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the representative */,
  "career_history" TEXT /* Career history of the representative */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the representative's term started */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the representative's term ended (or NULL if still in office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current leader of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., HD for House District) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the district */,
  "geographic_bounds" TEXT /* Geographic bounds of the district (e.g., latitude and longitude coordinates) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the district */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the district */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities in the district */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Average voter turnout in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the governor of the state */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the state's flag */,
  "seal_url" TEXT /* URL of the state's seal */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the state's official website */,
  "economic_profile" TEXT /* Economic data about the state */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the state */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the state */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_governor_id FOREIGN KEY ("governor_id") REFERENCES governors ("governor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governors" (
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the governor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the governor */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the governor */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the governor's term started */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the governor's term ended (or NULL if still in office) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the governor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the governor */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the governor's photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the governor's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the governor */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the governor */,
  "career_history" TEXT /* Career history of the governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election took place */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the election */,
  "total_voters_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who turned out for the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., mail, in-person) */,
  "results_url" TEXT /* URL where the election results can be found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the candidate is running in */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate is running for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., won, lost, running) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "career_history" TEXT /* Career history of the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "campaign_fund_raised" INTEGER /* Amount of money raised for the campaign */,
  "campaign_fund_spent" INTEGER /* Amount of money spent on the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number assigned by the legislative body */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  "primary_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary sponsor of the bill */,
  "secondary_sponsor_ids" TEXT /* Array of references to secondary sponsors of the bill */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee handling the bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative session in which the bill was introduced */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the bill */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bill */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the bill */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was last updated */,
  "public_comments" INTEGER /* Indicates whether public comments are allowed on the bill */,
  "public_comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of public comments on the bill */,
  "public_comment_url" TEXT /* URL where public comments can be found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_primary_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_sponsor_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chair of the committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., standing, special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Meeting schedule of the committee */,
  "public_meetings" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the committee meetings are open to the public */,
  "public_meeting_url" TEXT /* URL where public meetings can be found */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the committee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the session took place */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the session */,
  "legislative_agenda" TEXT /* Legislative agenda for the session */,
  "public_hearing_count" INTEGER /* Number of public hearings held during the session */,
  "public_hearing_url" TEXT /* URL where public hearings can be found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registered voter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the voter's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the voter's address */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province of the voter's address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the voter's address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the voter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "voter_turnout_history" TEXT /* Voter's turnout history in previous elections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
